instruction:
Write a compelling marketplace listing for Acquire.com that follows their format:

- Listing Title (max 80 chars) - something catchy about AI-powered monitoring
- One-liner description
- Business Model: SaaS
- Monthly Revenue: Pre-revenue (concept-validated)
- Asking Price: €1,500,000
- Key highlights (5 bullet points that make buyers want this)
- Detailed description (500-800 words) - tell the complete story
- What's included in the sale
- Growth opportunities
- Reason for selling: "AI-native holding company divesting standalone asset"

Key selling points to emphasize:
- Built for under $20, validated €1M+ ARR market
- Complete technical + marketing foundation (no development needed)
- First-mover advantage in AI-powered SMB monitoring for Hetzner
- Ready-to-launch with proven customer demand

Use the market research and business case data from existing files to make compelling arguments. This needs to make a buyer immediately want to purchase.

Save to `shared/results/DATA_ROOM/07_TEASER_LISTING.md`
